calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Assignment Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Nov-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -

PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'s Motion For Assignment Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order. Granted, no opposition filed. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Not Reported (302/CWW)

Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
